response.justification: Bogdan has impressive technical breadth, open-source contributions, and leadership in project development, but lacks proven executive-level leadership experience, has only basic German proficiency (falling short of C1 requirement), and shows no explicit experience with UML, IT security compliance, or formal project management — all critical for this role.
strengths: Strong open-source contributions with GISCollective and multiple DLang/Node.js libraries
Proven full-stack expertise across diverse tech stacks and domains (embedded, web, mobile, AI)
Demonstrated mentorship and workshop leadership in testing, CI/CD, and web internals
concerns: German language proficiency is only 'basic' — does not meet minimum C1 requirement
No evidence of formal IT architecture design, UML modeling, or compliance/risk management experience
Lacks documented experience managing teams or leading client-facing technical strategy at executive level
